header.tagline: developer тАв builder тАв nerd тАв bibliophile

home.greeting: Hey there! ЁЯСЛ Welcome to my terminal portfolio.
intro: I'm Bhavya Dang тАФ a developer who enjoys building things for the web, learning how systems work,
and writing code that hopefully doesn't break in production.
This TUI is my corner of the internet, accessible right from your terminal.
Navigate using the tabs above or press 1тАУ5 to jump directly.

bio: I'm a developer from Delhi, India, currently working at Ciena.
I love building for the web and exploring how things work under the hood.
At the moment, I am trying to learn Golang and system design by building small projects. (like this app!)
When I'm not writing code, I'm probably watching shows, reading novels, or making my homelab.
I'm passionate about clean code, good tooling, and system design principles.
